title: Kerala High Court asks Centre whether hormone therapy, sex change halted due to Transgender Amendment Act
description: The Kerala High Court on Tuesday asked the Central government to clear the air on whether gender affirming surgeries and hormone therapy are barred/ halted under the recently enacted Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill, 2026.Justice Bechu Kurian Thomas asked Additional Solicitor General (ASG) P Sreekumar about how the law impacts hormone therapy.This was after two transgender persons moved the Court challenging the law and claiming that the hospital stopped their hormone re
